title: astronia sabahensis
intro: Astronia sabahensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Malaysian astronia." This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astronia sabahensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Astronia sabahensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, with its leaves being the most commonly used part for extraction.
